body.p: The local group Berlin of the Free Software Foundation Europe e.V. (FSFE) and the Digital Zebra invite you to the Linux Presentation Day, a hands-on workshop designed to make it easier to switch to or get started with Linux.

ul.li: Presentation: Finding common programs for everyday use on Linux
Q&A session to answer your questions about switching
Demo devices running Linux for you to try out
Admission is free; registration is requested
The event will be conducted primarily in German. However, questions can also be answered in English.
